channel.title: Phucked Up Hackery
channel.description: Recent content on Phucked Up Hackery

item.title: Example
item.description: hello darkness my old buddy. I’ve come to speak with you again. you created this file in the blog top level folder using the commnad hugo new posts/example.md then you edited it with helix. then when you finished editing it you manually changed the draft from true to false now you will run hugo and hugo server to build the static webiste and start a local server to view changes, all within the top level folder of your blog
